title: Conditional coloring of Sum
excerpt: Conditional coloring of the auto-sum (bottom of column) based on defined parameters (like color SUM cell green if SUM > 20, Red if SUM <-20).

posts.author: kare (Kåre Kabel Mai)
posts.cookedHtml: Conditional coloring of the auto-sum (bottom of column) based on defined parameters (like color SUM cell green if SUM > 20, Red if SUM <-20).
